_notes.lodesYear: Latest available LODES8 year (2021 as of 2024)
_notes.primaryN: Routes with rank ≤ primaryN are shown by default; the rest are supplemental (shown faintly, highlighted when their neighborhood is selected)
_notes.minCommuters: Minimum aggregated daily commuters for a neighborhood pair
_notes.maxAssignDistKm: Max km from a tract centroid to its nearest neighborhood to be included
